record.field: Construction: Work Item - Set Work Item name and reference
Construction: Work Item - Set unit, unit cost and unit price from product
Construction: Work Item - Update product cost and price
Construction: SOL - Scale associated Work Item
Construction: Work Item - Actualize product reference
Construction: Work Item - Set as template
Construction: Work Item - Create new product for work item

for wi in records: new_product = env['product.product'].create({ 'name': wi.x_name, 'default_code': wi.x_reference, 'type': 'service', 'service_policy': "delivered_manual", 'list_price': wi.x_unit_price, 'standard_price': wi.x_unit_cost, 'uom_id': wi.x_unit_id.id, }) record.write({'x_product_id': new_product.id})
Construction: Work Item - Update associated SO line
Construction: SOL - Create associated Work Item
Construction: SOL - Open SOL Work Item
Construction: Product - Assign Template Work Item
